title: Better Vanilla Books
description: A simplistic and easy to use plugin that adds more Vanilla Enchantment Books
body:
Looking for a more **Vanilla** way to enchant weapons and tools? Well you've certainly come to the right place.

**Better Vanilla Books** helps with just that, by adding a command for administrators, and allowing you access to Physical
enchantment books of any level that can be applied with an Anvil, something to help keep that fresh Vanilla experience for you
and your community.


### Commands
  - /bvb <enchantment name> <level>
